##

# In [router.tsx](./router.tsx), we create a `Router` instance that loads all routes from this folder using `createFileRouter(...)`.

# [routeTree.ts](./routeTree.ts) is automatically generated by `createFileRouter(...)` and exports the route tree for type-safe route references across the app.

# [index.tsx](./routes/index.tsx) and [\_\_root.tsx](./routes/__root.tsx) are the main entry points for page routes. Other files define additional pages and API handlers.

# In \_\_root we have defined :

- The main layout of the app, which includes the header and footer.
- The main SEO metadata for the app, including the title and description.
